title: Add second Y axis to chart widget
excerpt: In another thread someone mentioned using an App to create charts with a second Y axis., but they didn’t say what the App was, and I’m unable to find it in the App Marketplace by searching. Does anyone know which app(s) …

posts.author: dwoodcock (Deb Woodcock)
posts.cookedHtml: In another thread someone mentioned using an App to create charts with a second Y axis., but they didn’t say what the App was, and I’m unable to find it in the App Marketplace by searching. Does anyone know which app(s) provide this functionality? Thanks.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Deb,

At this point, I am not familiar with apps that support a second Y axis, but I will do some investigating and let you know if I find or hear anything

posts.author: alioshr (Aliosh)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, any news on this? I would like to have a 2 axis simple chart combining bars + a line which is an accumulator of the total spent in budged in a time range. The bars would show the total per month on the other hand. I guess that he is talking about this other thread: 2 Axis / Combo Charts

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@dwoodcock @BiancaT @alioshr The Analytics & Reports app by Screenful has dual axis line chart. You can learn more by watching the video on the Tour page:

screenful.com

Line chart with dual axis - Screenful Tour

Learn more about the Line chart with dual axis in Screenful. Visualize your data like never before. Add charts to reports and dashboards. Share insights with anyone on your team.

posts.author: alioshr (Aliosh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @sl1nna , but this is a payed integration. I guess that there are others like this.

What at least I was expecting was a native option on Monday as a feature. =)

On an engineering standpoint it should not be very complicated to extend a functionality from 1 to 2 axis on a chart.

I would never want to pay 50 dollars/month just to see a second axis on a chart.
